subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God, Who art my Desire and Adoration! Thou hearest the call of Thy loved ones and seest the deeds of Thy chosen ones
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و مقصودی و معبودی تسمع ندآء احبائک و تری عمل اولیائک انهم
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @prayer for teaching, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
